---
name: Maintenance / Refactoring
about: Suggest code improvements, dependencies updates, or technical debt cleanup
title: "[Maint]"
labels: chore, refactor
assignees: Robertkq

---

**Is your proposal related to a specific pain point or technical debt? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the current state of the code that needs attention (e.g., duplicated code, outdated libraries, hard-to-read logic).

**Describe the proposed changes**
A clear and concise description of the refactoring or maintenance work you want to perform. What will the new structure or approach look like?

**Expected impact and benefits**
What will this change achieve? (e.g., better performance, easier extensibility, cleaner code, fixed technical debt). 

**Steps to implement / Checklist**
A rough list of tasks needed to complete this work:
- [ ] Refactor X component
- [ ] Update Y configuration
- [ ] Ensure existing tests still pass / Add new tests

**Additional context**
Add any other context, code snippets, or links to related files here.
